title: Crumbling City
description:
Crumbling City is a fun physics based destruction game with procedurally generated worlds, playable both in VR and on PC

DESTROYYou are a dinosaur trying to take back and restore your natural habitat that has been destroyed by humanity. Now its your turn to destroy their beautiful cities

With your big dino claws you can crumble huge skyscrapers within SECONDS!

But you also have an arsenal of weapons and special abilities at your disposal, which are all based on the four natural elements: EARTH - AIR - WATER - FIRE.

And to make your battle even CRAZIER, there are lots of boosters that will temporarily increase your health, speed, armor and so on.

ATTACKBut it's not as easy as it seems! You have to hurry and always be on the lookout for the CITY DEFENDERS! They will chase you around the city and use their big guns to prevent you from destroying their city.

LOTS OF UNIQUE MISSIONS AND LEVELSSuccessfully complete missions to win awards and to move closer to the ultimate city center. Or play one of the custom levels like Japan, Halloween, Wild West… 

CREATE YOUR OWN CRUMBLING CITYThe game also has a complete sandbox city creation mode where you can make and customize your own cities… and then destroy them again.

The game is made with VR in mind but can just as well be played with mouse and keyboard.
description_short: Become a giant dinosaur and flatten entire cities before the City Defenders can stop you! Crumbling City is chaos and fun in a physics based destructible world. Rampage across cities as a colossal dinosaur and leave nothing standing! Nature’s revenge has never been this fun!
